# backend-review-triage

> Use when starting a backend review or when the user asks "review this backend / server / API" without naming a specific concern. Classifies the service (API / worker / batch / event-driven), detects the stack (language, framework, DB, queue), and decides which backend-review-* lenses to run in what order. Entry point for the backend-review family — do NOT use for a review scoped to one named concern (go straight to that lens skill).

## Install

### APM (recommended)

```bash
apm install HukuKaich0u/agent-kit/skills/backend/review-triage
```

Or declare it in `apm.yml` for a reproducible setup:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - HukuKaich0u/agent-kit/skills/backend/review-triage
```

then run `apm install`.

### Any agentskills.io-compatible agent

This is an [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io) skill — a portable
`SKILL.md` folder that works with Claude Code, Codex, opencode, Gemini CLI,
Cursor, and other [compatible agents](https://agentskills.io/clients).

With the [`skills`](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills) CLI (installs into
every detected agent's skills directory):

```bash
npx skills add HukuKaich0u/agent-kit --skill backend-review-triage
```

Or copy the folder in directly:

```bash
npx degit HukuKaich0u/agent-kit/skills/backend/review-triage ~/.claude/skills/backend-review-triage
```

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->
